feat.name: Evolved Spellhorn
feat.text: Your inborn arcane power grows. Choose one common 1st-rank arcane spell and one common 2nd-rank arcane spell. You can cast each of these spells once per day as arcane innate spells.

traits.name: Kobold
traits.text: A creature with this trait is a member of the kobold ancestry, reptilian humanoids who are usually Small and typically have darkvision. An ability with this trait can be used or selected only by kobolds.
